    @allure.title("Verify Mumbai property search supports requested filter selections")
    def test_mumbai_search_and_requested_filters_with_xpaths(self, base_url: str, test_data: dict) -> None:
        location = test_data["property_search"]["filtered_location"]
        home_page = HomePage(self.driver)
        home_page.open(base_url)
        home_page.search_property_from_landmark_bar(location)
    
        results_page = SearchResultsPage(self.driver)
        assert results_page.has_results_loaded(), "Search results page did not load expected result content."
        results_page.apply_budget_range_from_requested_xpaths()
